title: hieracium biscutellifolium
intro: Hieracium biscutellifolium, also known as Hawkweed or False Hawkbit, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium biscutellifolium are attributed to its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Hieracium biscutellifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal benefits, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
